features: Wildly Wondrous Scent: Immerse yourself in the delightful aroma of juicy jungle papaya, sunny passionfruit, and a dollop of apricot nectar
Gently Cleanses: This shower gel leaves skin feeling soft, smooth, and revitalized after each use.
Cruelty-free and Vegan: Cussons Creations is committed to sustainability A compassionate choice for conscious consumers
For the whole family: Our body wash is formulated to be suitable for all the family, ensuring a delightful and refreshing shower every time
Artfully Crafted Design: Our packaging is 100 Percent recyclable, with eye-catching designs that also add some fun to your bathroom
description: Product Description Tickle your senses with this wildly wondrous blend of juicy jungle papaya, sunny passionfruit and a dollop of apricot nectar... totally tropical Leaves skin feeling clean and soft. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-7, Lactic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Glycol Distearate, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Geraniol, Limonene, CI 19140, CI 15510 Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. See more
